Start by sending your details through the contact form: business name, your logo or the idea for one, and what you're hoping the kit covers. The shop replies with the setup — what your $298 buys — and confirms the plan with you before production starts. If your logo only exists as a blurry image, the $10 vector redraw service can clean it up first.

The kit comes out of Hatfield McCoy DTF in Logan, West Virginia. Finished work ships nationwide, and local pickup in Logan can be arranged if you're close.

Vector art keeps its edges crisp at any size, which is exactly what a good print needs. For $10 a design, the shop takes whatever you've got — a low-res JPG, a pixelated logo, a photo of an old shirt — and redraws it as clean vector artwork ready for production.

Ordering happens right on this page. Upload your current file (PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS, up to 50MB), set the quantity to match how many designs need redrawing, add to cart, and pay through Shopify checkout. The file rides along with your order, and you can also attach it from the cart if you skipped the upload here.

Putting transfers in the same cart? Do it — the redrawn art can go straight onto your print job. Not sure a file can be salvaged? Call the shop at (304) 688-9970 and ask.

products.title: RUSH FEE - for same-day or expedited Printing

copy.shortDescription: Sometimes the calendar wins and a job has to jump the line. This is the fee that makes that happen — one flat charge to expedite your printing.
copy.bodyHtml:
This is a flat $50 charge that expedites one job. It covers the shop bumping your order ahead of the standard schedule — nothing else changes about the products you ordered.

To use it, add the rush fee to your cart alongside the items it covers and pay through Shopify checkout. Already placed your order? Buy the fee on its own, then call (304) 688-9970 so the shop can match it to the right job.

Two honest caveats. Some products carry built-in lead times — 30-inch gang sheets run 5-7 days because material is ordered per job, apparel and fluorescent DTF each carry a 5-7 day lead time, and large-format UV DTF runs go through a partner press on a similar schedule — so call before paying if your job falls in one of those buckets. And the fee speeds up printing, not the carrier: if you're near Logan, West Virginia, pickup can be arranged and skips shipping altogether.

products.title: Sublimation 24"

copy.shortDescription: Sublimation transfers printed on a 24-inch-wide roll and sold by the length. These go on polyester fabric and hard goods, not cotton.
copy.bodyHtml:
You're buying printed transfer paper, sized by length on a 24-inch-wide roll. Seven lengths cover most jobs — $12.75 at 36 inches, $21.25 at 60, $31 at 84, with $8.50 and $34 bookending the range. Run one big graphic or gang several designs onto a single sheet.

The order flow lives on this page: send us the file through the uploader (PNG, JPG, PDF, AI, or EPS, up to 50MB), pick a sheet length, add to cart, and pay through checkout — the artwork rides along with your order.

If the job is a cotton shirt, our DTF sheets are the better route. Orders ship nationwide out of Logan, West Virginia, and local pickup can be arranged.

products.offerCopy: Seven lengths on the 24-inch roll: $8.50 for 24" x 24", $17 at 48 inches, $26 at 72, and $34 for the longest 24" x 96" sheet.

products.title: Custom Gang Sheet

copy.shortDescription: A gang sheet packs multiple designs onto one print run, so you pay for sheet space instead of per design. This is the build-it-yourself version — your layout, your sheet.
copy.bodyHtml:
The button on this page opens the gang sheet builder. Pick a sheet size, then arrange your designs across it — mix sizes, mix artwork, pack it as tight as you like. The builder totals your sheet as you go, and checkout happens right inside it.

Builder sheets run $0.60 over the flat sheet price. If your job doesn't fit the fixed sheet sizes — odd dimensions, bulk runs, or a layout you'd rather hand off — the contact form still gets you a setup plan and a firm price before anything prints. Prefer to talk it through? Call (304) 688-9970.

Either way these are standard DTF, warm-peel transfers — press, wait a few seconds, peel while warm — and finished sheets ship nationwide or wait for pickup in Logan, West Virginia.

products.offerCopy: Lay the sheet out yourself in the gang sheet builder for $0.60 over the flat sheet price; jobs the fixed sheet sizes can't handle can still be quoted per job through the contact form.
